commit.subject: LU-3534 tests: Add dne-2.5 upgrade test
commit.message:
LU-3534 tests: Add dne-2.5 upgrade test

Add extra dne tests in conf-sanity.sh 32c to verify
dne upgrade from 2.5 DNE ldiskfs images to 2.7 DNE.
